task_completion.description: Visit check.torproject.org to identify the first exit node IP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to https://check.torproject.org/ and an IP address is clearly displayed on the page.

task_completion.description: Visit www.torproject.org to verify general connectivity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to https://www.torproject.org/ showing the Tor Project homepage.

task_completion.description: Perform a circuit rotation and obtain a second, different exit node IP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to https://check.torproject.org/ displaying a new IP address that is visibly different from the first recorded IP address.

task_completion.description: Bookmark check.torproject.org with the exact required title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser's bookmark dialog or bookmark manager is visible, showing https://check.torproject.org/ saved with the exact name 'Tor Connection Verifier'.

task_completion.description: Create the circuit verification report at the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open with the file path '/home/ga/Documents/circuit_report.txt' visible in the window title, tab, or save dialog.

task_completion.description: Include all required information in the circuit verification report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor shows the contents of the report, which must include: the current date, two distinct IP addresses, a statement on circuit rotation success status, and a statement on Tor connection status.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser GUI to visit the websites and perform circuit rotation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a graphical web browser (like Firefox or Tor Browser) rendering the web pages, rather than terminal curl/wget commands.

integrity.description: The IPs recorded in the report match the actual IPs seen during the browsing session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The two IP addresses typed into the text report exactly match the IP addresses displayed on the check.torproject.org website in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to create and format the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor interface (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) being used to write the report, rather than just echoing a pre-written string from the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The report must be saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/circuit_report.txt'. The agent must visit 'check.torproject.org' and 'www.torproject.org'. The bookmark for check.torproject.org must be titled exactly 'Tor Connection Verifier'.
